title: Get Version
description: Retrieves reader component version information including Boot Loader, OS, Reader Application, and Radio Firmware versions.

command.description: The value for the key command must be get_version.

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

response.description: The execution status of the requested command.

availableOsUpgrades.description: Key-value map of OS upgrade packages currently available to the reader.

cloudAgentApplication.description: Version of the cloud agent application running on the reader.

model.description: Hardware model identifier of the reader.

radioControlApplication.description: Version of the radio control application running on the reader.

radioFirmware.description: Firmware version running on the RFID radio module.

readerApplication.description: Version of the main reader application software.

revertBackFirmware.description: Firmware rollback information available on the reader.

serialNumber.description: Unique serial number assigned to the reader.

payload.title: Get Version Response Payload
payload.description: The object containing the component version information.
